chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5921 OF 2022 Mst. Saeeda Begum Versus M/s Age & Sons (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 25089/23 3. For orders on CMA 25090/23 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 24.10.2023 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon for petitioner. -.-.- It seems that by way of a compromise, subject suit was decreed, which decree/order was set aside on an application under section 12 CPC. Aggrieved of it a revision application was then filed, which was dismissed for non-prosecution followed by dismissal of application for its restoration. Although the suit is pending for trial and the petitioner could well take up his case before the trial Court, but as far as this petition is concerned there is nothing to interfere in the order as not only the appellant has failed to appear in the revision application but also failed to pursue the restoration application, which too was dismissed for non-prosecution. All that was done was within court’s jurisdiction. The indulgence cannot be given to an individual who has remained indolent. Even otherwise the suit is pending and it could well be decided as deemed fit and proper, in the circumstances of the case, by the Court below. Instant petition as such is dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
